scenarios.title: Co-Scientist Capability Check: Researcher Discovery with Affiliations and Citations
scenarios.topic_fixture: LRRK2 inhibitor development in Parkinson's disease (example fixture)
scenarios.prompt: Find researchers who have published on LRRK2 inhibitor development for Parkinson's disease in the last 3 years, include affiliations, and summarize evidence with citations.

scenarios.title: Co-Scientist Capability Check: Target-or-Trap Decision with Risks and Next Actions
scenarios.prompt: Target or Trap: should BACE1 still be pursued for Alzheimer's disease? Provide a risk assessment with evidence, limitations, and next actions.
